headline: Valmont Shares Rise 34% YTD: Here's What's Driving the Upside
summary: VMI's 34% YTD rally is fueled by strong utility demand, higher margins and raised 2026 guidance as grid investments and operational gains support growth.

headline: LYB Partners Mondelez & Others for Flexible Packaging Solution
summary: LYB partners with Mondelez, Amcor and Taghleef to launch 75% recycled-content packaging for Marabou chocolate bars using CirculenRevive polymers.

headline: Here's Why You Should Add Methanex Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: MEOH is boosting output with stronger gas supply, new assets and resilient methanol demand, positioning the company for long-term value and cash generation.

headline: Albemarle (ALB) Could Be 39% Undervalued On Earnings Date And Cost Saving Story
summary: Albemarle (ALB) is back in focus after the company scheduled its second quarter 2026 earnings release for August 5, with a follow up conference call on August 6 for investors and analysts. See our latest analysis for Albemarle. Albemarle’s share price has come under pressure recently, with the stock down 3.57% over the last day and 17% over 30 days, even though the 1 year total shareholder return of 86.22% still points to strong earlier gains and more mixed results over 3 and 5 years.
